This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and phylogenetic relationships.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.
